from pathlib import Path
paths = [
'src/content/posts/en/apollo-justice-ace-attorney-trilogy-worth-it.md',
'src/content/posts/zh-hans/apollo-justice-ace-attorney-trilogy-worth-it.md',

'src/content/posts/pt/apollo-justice-ace-attorney-trilogy-worth-it.md',
]

    print(('EXISTS' if Path(p).exists() else 'MISSING') + ' ' + p)
PY
